    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "enable_publication_badges:\r\n  altmetric: true # Altmetric badge (Customization options: https://badge-docs.altmetric.com/index.html)\r\n  dimensions: true # Dimensions badge (Customization options: https://badge.dimensions.ai/)\r\n  google_scholar: true # Google Scholar badge (https://scholar.google.com/intl/en/scholar/citations.html)\r\n  inspirehep: true # Inspire HEP badge (https://help.inspirehep.net/knowledge-base/citation-metrics/)\r\n\r\n# Filter out certain bibtex entry keywords used internally from the bib output\r\nfiltered_bibtex_keywords:\r\n  [\r\n    abbr,\r\n    abstract,\r\n    additional_info,\r\n    altmetric,\r\n    annotation,\r\n    arxiv,\r\n    award,\r\n    award_name,\r\n    bibtex_show,\r\n    blog,\r\n    code,\r\n    google_scholar_id,\r\n    html,\r\n    inspirehep_id,\r\n    pdf,\r\n    poster,\r\n    preview,\r\n    selected,\r\n    slides,\r\n    supp,\r\n    video,\r\n    website,\r\n  ]\r\n\r\n# Maximum number of authors to be shown for each publication (more authors are visible on click)\r\nmax_author_limit: 3 # leave blank to always show all authors\r\nmore_authors_animation_delay: 10 # more authors are revealed on click using animation; smaller delay means faster animation\r\n\r\n# Enables publication thumbnails. If disabled, none of the publications will display thumbnails, even if specified in the bib entry.\r\nenable_publication_thumbnails: true\r\n\r\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Jekyll Link Attributes\r\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\n# These are the defaults\r\nexternal_links:\r\n  enabled: true\r\n  rel: external nofollow noopener\r\n  target: _blank\r\n  exclude:\r\n\r\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Responsive WebP Images\r\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\n# MAKE SURE imagemagick is installed and on your PATH before enabling imagemagick. In a terminal, run:\r\n#   convert -version\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 340,
            "text": "# Customize badge behavior in _layouts/bib.liquid\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 341,
            "text": "enable_publication_badges:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 342,
            "text": "  altmetric: true # Altmetric badge (Customization options: https://badge-docs.altmetric.com/index.html)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 343,
            "text": "  dimensions: true # Dimensions badge (Customization options: https://badge.dimensions.ai/)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 344,
            "text": "  google_scholar: true # Google Scholar badge (https://scholar.google.com/intl/en/scholar/citations.html)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 345,
            "text": "  inspirehep: true # Inspire HEP badge (https://help.inspirehep.net/knowledge-base/citation-metrics/)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 346,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 347,
            "text": "# Filter out certain bibtex entry keywords used internally from the bib output\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 348,
            "text": "filtered_bibtex_keywords:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 349,
            "text": "  [\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 350,
            "text": "    abbr,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 351,
            "text": "    abstract,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 352,
            "text": "    additional_info,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 353,
            "text": "    altmetric,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 354,
            "text": "    annotation,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 355,
            "text": "    arxiv,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 356,
            "text": "    award,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 357,
            "text": "    award_name,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 358,
            "text": "    bibtex_show,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 359,
            "text": "    blog,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 360,
            "text": "    code,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 361,
            "text": "    google_scholar_id,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 362,
            "text": "    html,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 363,
            "text": "    inspirehep_id,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 364,
            "text": "    pdf,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 365,
            "text": "    poster,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 366,
            "text": "    preview,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 367,
            "text": "    selected,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 368,
            "text": "    slides,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 369,
            "text": "    supp,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 370,
            "text": "    video,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 371,
            "text": "    website,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 372,
            "text": "  ]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 373,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 374,
            "text": "# Maximum number of authors to be shown for each publication (more authors are visible on click)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 375,
            "text": "max_author_limit: 3 # leave blank to always show all authors\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 376,
            "text": "more_authors_animation_delay: 10 # more authors are revealed on click using animation; smaller delay means faster animation\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 377,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 378,
            "text": "# Enables publication thumbnails. If disabled, none of the publications will display thumbnails, even if specified in the bib entry.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 379,
            "text": "enable_publication_thumbnails: true\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 380,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 381,
            "text": "# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 382,
            "text": "# Jekyll Link Attributes\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 383,
            "text": "# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 384,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 385,
            "text": "# These are the defaults\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 386,
            "text": "external_links:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 387,
            "text": "  enabled: true\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 388,
            "text": "  rel: external nofollow noopener\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 389,
            "text": "  target: _blank\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 390,
            "text": "  exclude:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 391,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 392,
            "text": "# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 393,
            "text": "# Responsive WebP Images\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 394,
            "text": "# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 395,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 396,
            "text": "# MAKE SURE imagemagick is installed and on your PATH before enabling imagemagick. In a terminal, run:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 397,
            "text": "#   convert -version\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 398,
            "text": "imagemagick:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 399,
            "text": "  enabled: true # enables responsive images for your site (recommended, see https://github.com/alshedivat/al-folio/issues/537)\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "enable_publication_badges:\r\n  altmetric: true # Altmetric badge (Customization options: https://badge-docs.altmetric.com/index.html)\r\n  dimensions: true # Dimensions badge (Customization options: https://badge.dimensions.ai/)\r\n  google_scholar: true # Google Scholar badge (https://scholar.google.com/intl/en/scholar/citations.html)\r\n  inspirehep: true # Inspire HEP badge (https://help.inspirehep.net/knowledge-base/citation-metrics/)\r\n\r\n# Filter out certain bibtex entry keywords used internally from the bib output\r\nfiltered_bibtex_keywords:\r\n  [\r\n    abbr,\r\n    abstract,\r\n    additional_info,\r\n    altmetric,\r\n    annotation,\r\n    arxiv,\r\n    award,\r\n    award_name,\r\n    bibtex_show,\r\n    blog,\r\n    code,\r\n    google_scholar_id,\r\n    html,\r\n    inspirehep_id,\r\n    pdf,\r\n    poster,\r\n    preview,\r\n    selected,\r\n    slides,\r\n    supp,\r\n    video,\r\n    website,\r\n  ]\r\n\r\n# Maximum number of authors to be shown for each publication (more authors are visible on click)\r\nmax_author_limit: 3 # leave blank to always show all authors\r\nmore_authors_animation_delay: 10 # more authors are revealed on click using animation; smaller delay means faster animation\r\n\r\n# Enables publication thumbnails. If disabled, none of the publications will display thumbnails, even if specified in the bib entry.\r\nenable_publication_thumbnails: true\r\n\r\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Jekyll Link Attributes\r\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\n# These are the defaults\r\nexternal_links:\r\n  enabled: true\r\n  rel: external nofollow noopener\r\n  target: _blank\r\n  exclude:\r\n\r\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Responsive WebP Images\r\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\n# MAKE SURE imagemagick is installed and on your PATH before enabling imagemagick. In a terminal, run:\r\n#   convert -version\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 399
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 339
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "_config.yml"
      },
      "score": 0.38887739181518555
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "          {% if site.enable_publication_badges.inspirehep and entry_has_inspirehep_badge %}\r\n            \u003ca\r\n              href=\"https://inspirehep.net/literature/{{ entry.inspirehep_id }}\"\r\n              aria-label=\"Inspirehep link\"\r\n              role=\"button\"\r\n            \u003e\r\n              \u003cimg\r\n                src=\"https://img.shields.io/badge/inspire-{% inspirehep_citations entry.inspirehep_id %}-001628?logo=inspire\u0026logoColor=001628\u0026labelColor=beige\"\r\n                alt=\"{% inspirehep_citations entry.inspirehep_id %} InspireHEP citations\"\r\n              \u003e\r\n            \u003c/a\u003e\r\n          {% endif %}\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n      {% endif %}\r\n    {% endif %}\r\n\r\n    {% if entry.award %}\r\n      \u003c!-- Hidden Award block --\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"award hidden d-print-inline\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cp\u003e{{ entry.award | markdownify }}\u003c/p\u003e\r\n      \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    {% endif %}\r\n\r\n    {% if entry.abstract %}\r\n      \u003c!-- Hidden abstract block --\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"abstract hidden\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cp\u003e{{ entry.abstract }}\u003c/p\u003e\r\n      \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    {% endif %}\r\n\r\n    {% if entry.bibtex_show %}\r\n      \u003c!-- Hidden bibtex block --\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"bibtex hidden\"\u003e\r\n        {% highlight bibtex %}\r\n        {{- entry.bibtex | hideCustomBibtex -}}\r\n        {% endhighlight %}\r\n      \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    {% endif %}\r\n\r\n    {% if entry.video and site.enable_video_embedding %}\r\n      \u003c!-- Hidden video block --\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"abstract hidden\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv style=\"text-align: center;\"\u003e{% include video.liquid path=entry.video class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" controls=true %}\u003c/div\u003e\r\n      \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    {% endif %}\r\n  \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n",

        ],
        "originalContents": "          {% if site.enable_publication_badges.inspirehep and entry_has_inspirehep_badge %}\r\n            \u003ca\r\n              href=\"https://inspirehep.net/literature/{{ entry.inspirehep_id }}\"\r\n              aria-label=\"Inspirehep link\"\r\n              role=\"button\"\r\n            \u003e\r\n              \u003cimg\r\n                src=\"https://img.shields.io/badge/inspire-{% inspirehep_citations entry.inspirehep_id %}-001628?logo=inspire\u0026logoColor=001628\u0026labelColor=beige\"\r\n                alt=\"{% inspirehep_citations entry.inspirehep_id %} InspireHEP citations\"\r\n              \u003e\r\n            \u003c/a\u003e\r\n          {% endif %}\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n      {% endif %}\r\n    {% endif %}\r\n\r\n    {% if entry.award %}\r\n      \u003c!-- Hidden Award block --\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"award hidden d-print-inline\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cp\u003e{{ entry.award | markdownify }}\u003c/p\u003e\r\n      \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    {% endif %}\r\n\r\n    {% if entry.abstract %}\r\n      \u003c!-- Hidden abstract block --\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"abstract hidden\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cp\u003e{{ entry.abstract }}\u003c/p\u003e\r\n      \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    {% endif %}\r\n\r\n    {% if entry.bibtex_show %}\r\n      \u003c!-- Hidden bibtex block --\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"bibtex hidden\"\u003e\r\n        {% highlight bibtex %}\r\n        {{- entry.bibtex | hideCustomBibtex -}}\r\n        {% endhighlight %}\r\n      \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    {% endif %}\r\n\r\n    {% if entry.video and site.enable_video_embedding %}\r\n      \u003c!-- Hidden video block --\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"abstract hidden\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv style=\"text-align: center;\"\u003e{% include video.liquid path=entry.video class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" controls=true %}\u003c/div\u003e\r\n      \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    {% endif %}\r\n  \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Jekyll Minifier\r\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\njekyll-minifier:\r\n  exclude: [\"robots.txt\", \"assets/js/search/*.js\", \"assets/libs/**/*\"]\r\n  uglifier_args:\r\n    harmony: true\r\n\r\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Jekyll Archives\r\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\njekyll-archives:\r\n  enabled: [year, tags, categories] # enables year, tag and category archives (remove if you need to disable one of them).\r\n  layouts:\r\n    year: archive-year\r\n    tag: archive-tag\r\n    category: archive-category\r\n  permalinks:\r\n    year: \"/blog/:year/\"\r\n    tag: \"/blog/tag/:name/\"\r\n    category: \"/blog/category/:name/\"\r\n\r\ndisplay_tags: [\"formatting\", \"images\", \"links\", \"math\", \"code\", \"blockquotes\"] # these tags will be displayed on the front page of your blog\r\ndisplay_categories: [\"external-services\"] # these categories will be displayed on the front page of your blog\r\n\r\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Jekyll Scholar\r\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nscholar:\r\n  last_name: [Wan]\r\n  first_name: [Zhengyang]\r\n\r\n  style: apa\r\n  locale: en\r\n\r\n  source: /_bibliography/\r\n  bibliography: papers.bib\r\n  bibliography_template: bib\r\n  # Note: if you have latex math in your bibtex, the latex filter\r\n  # preprocessing may conflict with MathJAX if the latter is enabled.\r\n  # See https://github.com/alshedivat/al-folio/issues/357.\r\n  bibtex_filters: [latex, smallcaps, superscript]\r\n\r\n  replace_strings: true\r\n  join_strings: true\r\n\r\n  details_dir: bibliography\r\n  details_link: Details\r\n\r\n  query: \"@*\"\r\n  group_by: year\r\n  group_order: descending\r\n\r\n# Display different badges withs stats for your publications\r\n# Customize badge behavior in _layouts/bib.liquid\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 277,
            "text": "values:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278,
            "text": "      sitemap: false\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280,
            "text": "sass:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 281,
            "text": "  style: compressed\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 282,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 283,
            "text": "# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284,
            "text": "# Jekyll Minifier\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285,
            "text": "# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 286,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 287,
            "text": "jekyll-minifier:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 288,
            "text": "  exclude: [\"robots.txt\", \"assets/js/search/*.js\", \"assets/libs/**/*\"]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 289,
            "text": "  uglifier_args:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 290,
            "text": "    harmony: true\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 291,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 292,
            "text": "# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 293,
            "text": "# Jekyll Archives\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294,
            "text": "# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 295,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 296,
            "text": "jekyll-archives:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 297,
            "text": "  enabled: [year, tags, categories] # enables year, tag and category archives (remove if you need to disable one of them).\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 298,
            "text": "  layouts:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 299,
            "text": "    year: archive-year\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 300,
            "text": "    tag: archive-tag\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 301,
            "text": "    category: archive-category\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 302,
            "text": "  permalinks:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 303,
            "text": "    year: \"/blog/:year/\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 304,
            "text": "    tag: \"/blog/tag/:name/\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 305,
            "text": "    category: \"/blog/category/:name/\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 306,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 307,
            "text": "display_tags: [\"formatting\", \"images\", \"links\", \"math\", \"code\", \"blockquotes\"] # these tags will be displayed on the front page of your blog\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 308,
            "text": "display_categories: [\"external-services\"] # these categories will be displayed on the front page of your blog\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 309,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 310,
            "text": "# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 311,
            "text": "# Jekyll Scholar\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 312,
            "text": "# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 313,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 314,
            "text": "scholar:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 315,
            "text": "  last_name: [Wan]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 316,
            "text": "  first_name: [Zhengyang]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 317,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 318,
            "text": "  style: apa\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 319,
            "text": "  locale: en\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 320,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 321,
            "text": "  source: /_bibliography/\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 322,
            "text": "  bibliography: papers.bib\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 323,
            "text": "  bibliography_template: bib\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 324,
            "text": "  # Note: if you have latex math in your bibtex, the latex filter\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325,
            "text": "  # preprocessing may conflict with MathJAX if the latter is enabled.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 326,
            "text": "  # See https://github.com/alshedivat/al-folio/issues/357.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 327,
            "text": "  bibtex_filters: [latex, smallcaps, superscript]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 328,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 329,
            "text": "  replace_strings: true\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 330,
            "text": "  join_strings: true\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 331,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 332,
            "text": "  details_dir: bibliography\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 333,
            "text": "  details_link: Details\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 334,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 335,
            "text": "  query: \"@*\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 336,
            "text": "  group_by: year\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 337,
            "text": "  group_order: descending\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 338,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 339,
            "text": "# Display different badges withs stats for your publications\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 340,
            "text": "# Customize badge behavior in _layouts/bib.liquid\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 341,
            "text": "enable_publication_badges:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 342,
            "text": "  altmetric: true # Altmetric badge (Customization options: https://badge-docs.altmetric.com/index.html)\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Jekyll Minifier\r\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\njekyll-minifier:\r\n  exclude: [\"robots.txt\", \"assets/js/search/*.js\", \"assets/libs/**/*\"]\r\n  uglifier_args:\r\n    harmony: true\r\n\r\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Jekyll Archives\r\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\njekyll-archives:\r\n  enabled: [year, tags, categories] # enables year, tag and category archives (remove if you need to disable one of them).\r\n  layouts:\r\n    year: archive-year\r\n    tag: archive-tag\r\n    category: archive-category\r\n  permalinks:\r\n    year: \"/blog/:year/\"\r\n    tag: \"/blog/tag/:name/\"\r\n    category: \"/blog/category/:name/\"\r\n\r\ndisplay_tags: [\"formatting\", \"images\", \"links\", \"math\", \"code\", \"blockquotes\"] # these tags will be displayed on the front page of your blog\r\ndisplay_categories: [\"external-services\"] # these categories will be displayed on the front page of your blog\r\n\r\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Jekyll Scholar\r\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nscholar:\r\n  last_name: [Wan]\r\n  first_name: [Zhengyang]\r\n\r\n  style: apa\r\n  locale: en\r\n\r\n  source: /_bibliography/\r\n  bibliography: papers.bib\r\n  bibliography_template: bib\r\n  # Note: if you have latex math in your bibtex, the latex filter\r\n  # preprocessing may conflict with MathJAX if the latter is enabled.\r\n  # See https://github.com/alshedivat/al-folio/issues/357.\r\n  bibtex_filters: [latex, smallcaps, superscript]\r\n\r\n  replace_strings: true\r\n  join_strings: true\r\n\r\n  details_dir: bibliography\r\n  details_link: Details\r\n\r\n  query: \"@*\"\r\n  group_by: year\r\n  group_order: descending\r\n\r\n# Display different badges withs stats for your publications\r\n# Customize badge behavior in _layouts/bib.liquid\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 342
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 4,
            "line": 276
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "_config.yml"
      },
      "score": 0.3533523976802826

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "---\r\n---\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r\n  {% if site.enable_publication_thumbnails %}\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col col-sm-2 abbr\"\u003e\r\n      {%- if entry.abbr -%}\r\n        {%- if site.data.venues[entry.abbr] -%}\r\n          {% assign venue_style = null %}\r\n          {% if site.data.venues[entry.abbr].color != blank %}\r\n            {% assign venue_style = site.data.venues[entry.abbr].color | prepend: 'style=\"background-color:' | append: '\"' %}\r\n          {%- endif -%}\r\n          \u003cabbr\r\n            class=\"badge rounded w-100\"\r\n            {% if venue_style %}\r\n              {{ venue_style }}\r\n            {% endif -%}\r\n          \u003e\r\n            {% if site.data.venues[entry.abbr].url %}\r\n              \u003ca href=\"{{ site.data.venues[entry.abbr].url }}\"\u003e{{ entry.abbr }}\u003c/a\u003e\r\n            {% else %}\r\n              \u003cdiv\u003e{{- entry.abbr -}}\u003c/div\u003e\r\n            {% endif %}\r\n          \u003c/abbr\u003e\r\n        {% else %}\r\n          \u003cabbr class=\"badge rounded w-100\"\u003e{{ entry.abbr }}\u003c/abbr\u003e\r\n        {% endif %}\r\n      {% endif %}\r\n      {% if entry.preview %}\r\n        {% if entry.preview contains '://' %}\r\n          \u003cimg class=\"preview z-depth-1 rounded\" src=\"{{ entry.preview }}\"\u003e\r\n        {% else %}\r\n          {% assign entry_path = entry.preview | prepend: '/assets/img/publication_preview/' %}\r\n          {%\r\n            include figure.liquid\r\n            loading=\"eager\"\r\n            path=entry_path\r\n            sizes = \"200px\"\r\n            class=\"preview z-depth-1 rounded\"\r\n            zoomable=true\r\n            alt=entry.preview\r\n          %}\r\n        {% endif %}\r\n      {% endif %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n  {% endif %}\r\n\r\n  \u003c!-- Entry bib key --\u003e\r\n  \u003cdiv id=\"{{ entry.key }}\" class=\"{% if site.enable_publication_thumbnails %}col-sm-8{% else %}col-sm-10{% endif %}\"\u003e\r\n    \u003c!-- Title --\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"title\"\u003e{{ entry.title }}\u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c!-- Author --\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"author\"\u003e\r\n      {% assign author_array_size = entry.author_array | size %}\r\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "{% if site.acm_id %}\r\n  \u003ca href=\"https://dl.acm.org/profile/{{ site.acm_id }}/\" title=\"ACM DL\"\u003e\u003ci class=\"ai ai-acm\"\u003e\u003c/i\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\r\n{% endif %}\r\n{% if site.scopus_id %}\r\n  \u003ca href=\"https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId={{ site.scopus_id }}\" title=\"Scopus\"\u003e\u003ci class=\"ai ai-scopus\"\u003e\u003c/i\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\r\n{% endif %}\r\n{% if site.github_username %}\r\n  \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/{{ site.github_username }}\" title=\"GitHub\"\u003e\u003ci class=\"fa-brands fa-github\"\u003e\u003c/i\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\r\n{% endif %}\r\n{% if site.linkedin_username %}\r\n  \u003ca href=\"https://www.linkedin.com/in/{{ site.linkedin_username }}\" title=\"LinkedIn\"\u003e\u003ci class=\"fa-brands fa-linkedin\"\u003e\u003c/i\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\r\n{% endif %}\r\n{% if site.x_username %}\r\n  \u003ca href=\"https://twitter.com/{{ site.x_username }}\" title=\"X\"\u003e\u003ci class=\"fa-brands fa-x-twitter\"\u003e\u003c/i\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\r\n{% endif %}\r\n{% if site.mastodon_username %}\r\n  \u003ca rel=\"me\" href=\"https://{{ site.mastodon_username  }}\" title=\"Mastodon\"\u003e\u003ci class=\"fa-brands fa-mastodon\"\u003e\u003c/i\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\r\n{% endif %}\r\n{% if site.medium_username %}\r\n  \u003ca href=\"https://medium.com/@{{ site.medium_username }}\" title=\"Medium\"\u003e\u003ci class=\"fa-brands fa-medium\"\u003e\u003c/i\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\r\n{% endif %}\r\n{% if site.quora_username %}\r\n  \u003ca href=\"https://www.quora.com/profile/{{ site.quora_username }}\" title=\"Quora\"\u003e\u003ci class=\"fa-brands fa-quora\"\u003e\u003c/i\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\r\n{% endif %}\r\n{% if         "contents": "      {% if entry.video and site.enable_video_embedding %}\r\n        \u003ca class=\"abstract btn btn-sm z-depth-0\" role=\"button\"\u003eVideo\u003c/a\u003e\r\n      {% elsif entry.video %}\r\n        \u003ca href=\"{{ entry.video }}\" class=\"btn btn-sm z-depth-0\" role=\"button\"\u003eVideo\u003c/a\u003e\r\n      {% endif %}\r\n      {% if entry.blog %}\r\n        \u003ca href=\"{{ entry.blog }}\" class=\"btn btn-sm z-depth-0\" role=\"button\"\u003eBlog\u003c/a\u003e\r\n      {% endif %}\r\n      {% if entry.code %}\r\n        \u003ca href=\"{{ entry.code }}\" class=\"btn btn-sm z-depth-0\" role=\"button\"\u003eCode\u003c/a\u003e\r\n      {% endif %}\r\n      {% if entry.poster %}\r\n        {% if entry.poster contains '://' %}\r\n          \u003ca         "originalContents": "\u003c!-- Metadata, OpenGraph and Schema.org --\u003e\r\n{% include metadata.liquid %}\r\n\r\n\u003c!-- Bootstrap \u0026 MDB --\u003e\r\n\u003clink rel=\"stylesheet\"       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "{% if site.serve_schema_org %}\r\n  \u003c!-- Schema.org --\u003e\r\n  {% comment %} Social links generator for \"sameAs schema\" {% endcomment %}\r\n  {% assign sameaslinks = '' | split: ',' %}\r\n  {% if site.orcid_id %}\r\n    {% capture link %}https://orcid.org/{{ site.orcid_id }}{% endcapture %}\r\n    {% assign sameaslinks = sameaslinks | push: link %}\r\n  {% endif %}\r\n  {% if site.scholar_userid %}\r\n    {% capture link %}https://scholar.google.com/citations?user={{ site.scholar_userid }}{% endcapture %}\r\n    {% assign sameaslinks = sameaslinks | push: link %}\r\n  {% endif %}\r\n  {% if site.semanticscholar_id %}\r\n    {% capture link %}https://www.semanticscholar.org/author/{{ site.semanticscholar_id }}{% endcapture %}\r\n    {% assign sameaslinks = sameaslinks | push: link %}\r\n  {% endif %}\r\n  {% if site.publons_id %}\r\n    {% capture link %}https://publons.com/a/{{ site.publons_id }}/{% endcapture %}\r\n    {% assign sameaslinks = sameaslinks | push: link %}\r\n  {% endif %}\r\n  {% if site.lattes_id %}\r\n    {% capture link %}http://lattes.cnpq.br/{{ site.lattes_id }}{% endcapture %}\r\n    {% assign sameaslinks = sameaslinks | push: link %}\r\n  {% endif %}\r\n  {% if site.osf_id %}\r\n    {% capture link %}https://osf.io/{{ site.osf_id }}/{% endcapture %}\r\n    {% assign sameaslinks = sameaslinks | push: link %}\r\n  {% endif %}\r\n  {% if site.research_gate_profile %}\r\n    {% capture link %}https://www.researchgate.net/profile/{{ site.research_gate_profile }}{% endcapture %}\r\n    {% assign sameaslinks = sameaslinks | push: link %}\r\n  {% endif %}\r\n  {% if site.scopus_id %}\r\n    {% capture link %}https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId={{ site.scopus_id }}{% endcapture %}\r\n    {% assign sameaslinks = sameaslinks | push: link %}\r\n  {% endif %}\r\n  {% if site.github_username %}\r\n    {% capture link %}https://github.com/{{ site.github_username }}{% endcapture %}\r\n    {% assign sameaslinks = sameaslinks | push: link %}\r\n  {% endif %}\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        {%- if site.semanticscholar_id -%}\r\n          {\r\n            id: 'socials-semantic-scholar',\r\n            title: 'Semantic Scholar',\r\n            section: 'Socials',\r\n            handler: () =\u003e {\r\n              window.open(\"https://www.semanticscholar.org/author/{{ site.semanticscholar_id }}\", \"_blank\");\r\n            },\r\n          },\r\n        {%- endif -%}\r\n        {%- if site.publons_id -%}\r\n          {\r\n            id: 'socials-publons',\r\n            title: 'Publons',\r\n            section: 'Socials',\r\n            handler: () =\u003e {\r\n              window.open(\"https://publons.com/a/{{ site.publons_id }}/\", \"_blank\");\r\n            },\r\n          },\r\n        {%- endif -%}\r\n        {%- if site.lattes_id -%}\r\n          {\r\n            id: 'socials-lattes',\r\n            title: 'Lattes',\r\n            section: 'Socials',\r\n            handler: () =\u003e {\r\n              window.open(\"http://lattes.cnpq.br/{{ site.lattes_id }}\", \"_blank\");\r\n            },\r\n          },\r\n        {%- endif -%}\r\n        {%- if site.osf_id -%}\r\n          {\r\n            id: 'socials-open-science-framework',\r\n            title: 'Open Science Framework',\r\n            section: 'Socials',\r\n            handler: () =\u003e {\r\n              window.open(\"https://osf.io/{{ site.osf_id }}/\", \"_blank\");\r\n            },\r\n          },\r\n        {%- endif -%}\r\n        {%- if site.research_gate_profile -%}\r\n          {\r\n            id: 'socials-researchgate',\r\n            title: 'ResearchGate',\r\n            section: 'Socials',\r\n            handler: () =\u003e {\r\n              window.open(\"https://www.researchgate.net/profile/{{ site.research_gate_profile }}/\", \"_blank\");\r\n            },\r\n          },\r\n        {%- endif -%}\r\n",

        "originalContents": "        {%- if site.semanticscholar_id -%}\r\n          {\r\n            id: 'socials-semantic-scholar',\r\n            title: 'Semantic Scholar',\r\n            section: 'Socials',\r\n            handler: () =\u003e {\r\n              window.open(\"https://www.semanticscholar.org/author/{{ site.semanticscholar_id }}\", \"_blank\");\r\n            },\r\n          },\r\n        {%- endif -%}\r\n        {%- if site.publons_id -%}\r\n          {\r\n            id: 'socials-publons',\r\n            title: 'Publons',\r\n            section: 'Socials',\r\n            handler: () =\u003e {\r\n              window.open(\"https://publons.com/a/{{ site.publons_id }}/\", \"_blank\");\r\n            },\r\n          },\r\n        {%- endif -%}\r\n        {%- if site.lattes_id -%}\r\n          {\r\n            id: 'socials-lattes',\r\n            title: 'Lattes',\r\n            section: 'Socials',\r\n            handler: () =\u003e {\r\n              window.open(\"http://lattes.cnpq.br/{{ site.lattes_id }}\", \"_blank\");\r\n            },\r\n          },\r\n        {%- endif -%}\r\n        {%- if site.osf_id -%}\r\n          {\r\n            id: 'socials-open-science-framework',\r\n            title: 'Open Science Framework',\r\n            section: 'Socials',\r\n            handler: () =\u003e {\r\n              window.open(\"https://osf.io/{{ site.osf_id }}/\", \"_blank\");\r\n            },\r\n          },\r\n        {%- endif -%}\r\n        {%- if site.research_gate_profile -%}\r\n          {\r\n            id: 'socials-researchgate',\r\n            title: 'ResearchGate',\r\n            section: 'Socials',\r\n            handler: () =\u003e {\r\n              window.open(\"https://www.researchgate.net/profile/{{ site.research_gate_profile }}/\", \"_blank\");\r\n            },\r\n          },\r\n        {%- endif -%}\r\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "Write your biography here. Tell the world about yourself. Link to your favorite [subreddit](http://reddit.com). You can put a picture in, too. The code is already in, just name your picture &#96;prof_pic.jpg&#96; and put it in the &#96;img/&#96; folder.\r\n\r\nPut your address / P.O. box / other info right below your picture. You can also disable any these elements by editing &#96;profile&#96; property of the YAML header of your &#96;_pages/about.md&#96;. Edit &#96;_bibliography/papers.bib&#96; and Jekyll will render your [publications page](/al-folio/publications/) automatically.\r\n\r\nLink to your social media connections, too. This theme is set up to use [Font Awesome icons](https://fontawesome.com/) and [Academicons](https://jpswalsh.github.io/academicons/), like the ones below. Add your Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, Google Scholar, or just disable all of them.\r\n",

_**Agent (default)**_


已在 Google Scholar badge 前添加图标。修改如下：

## 恢复 Google Scholar 图标

在 badge 前添加了 Academicons 的 Google Scholar 图标（`ai ai-google-scholar`），与社交链接中的图标一致。

```311:325:_layouts/bib.liquid
          {% if site.enable_publication_badges.google_scholar and entry_has_google_scholar_badge %}
            <a
              href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?view_op=view_citation&hl=en&user={{ site.scholar_userid }}&citation_for_view={{ site.scholar_userid }}:{{ entry.google_scholar_id }}"
              aria-label="Google Scholar link"
              role="button"
              style="display: inline-flex; align-items: center; text-decoration: none; margin-right: 3px;"
            >
              <i class="ai ai-google-scholar" style="font-size: 1.2em; margin-right: 4px; color: #4285F4;"></i>
              <img
                src="https://img.shields.io/badge/scholar-{% google_scholar_citations site.scholar_userid entry.google_scholar_id %}-4285F4?logo=googlescholar&labelColor=beige"
                alt="{% google_scholar_citations site.scholar_userid entry.google_scholar_id %} Google Scholar citations"
                style="vertical-align: middle;"
              >
            </a>
          {% endif %}
```

现在 Google Scholar badge 会显示：
1. Academicons 图标（左侧，蓝色）
2. shields.io badge（右侧，显示引用数）

图标和 badge 对齐，颜色与 Google Scholar 品牌色一致。请重新构建网站查看效果。
